input: I need to file my taxes
notes: Classic ADHD avoidance task — clear enough to plan without clarifying question
Genuinely ambiguous — repair vs registration vs insurance. Should trigger clarifying question

input: I want to apply for that job at the design studio I saw on Instagram
notes: Specific enough to plan. First action should be finding/bookmarking the actual posting

input: clean my apartment before my parents visit on Saturday
notes: Time-sensitive, multi-room. Good test for dependency ordering and energy tagging

input: I need to set up my new laptop
notes: Technical, multiple prerequisites. Tests dependency ordering and concrete first actions
